subject: Whis, the Angel attendant of Universe 7, depicted as a tall slender robed figure with white upswept hair
description: A tall, slender humanoid figure stands in a composed, slightly angled stance at the center of the frame. The figure wears a long robe with a white upper body and a deep red lower skirt, decorated with a black-and-gold diamond lattice pattern across the chest. The hair is white and swept upward into a pronounced rounded shape. The figure's posture is relaxed and self-assured, one hand at the side. Behind the figure, radiating energy lines burst outward in a blue-white flash effect, and tropical green palm-tree shapes are visible at the lower frame edges. The image is low-resolution so finer details of the face and insignia are indistinct.
foreground: Tall robed figure with diamond-patterned robe standing upright
background: Blue-white energy burst with radiating lines, tropical foliage shapes at edges
